title: Graphic Designer
desc: We work with established brands. That means you'll receive creative briefs, style guides, brochures, website references, past examples, brand colours, fonts, and plenty of direction. We're not looking for someone to reinvent the wheel every time. We're looking for someone who can take all of that information, understand the assignment, and deliver work that feels like it belongs to the brand. If you've ever been told you're exceptionally good at following a brief, paying attention to details, and bringing ideas to life while staying true to the vision, keep reading. The ideal candidate is creative, collaborative, reliable, and genuinely enjoys the process of turning direction into polished, professional work. Bonus points if you're the type of person who notices when a logo is two pixels off-center. A few important notes: • This is a freelance, remote position. • We value communication, responsiveness, and meeting deadlines. • We believe great work comes from collaboration, not mind-reading. • Shortlisted candidates will be offered a paid trial assignment based on a real client brief. Most importantly, I'm looking to build long-term relationships with good people. I understand that freelancers are balancing multiple clients and priorities, and I believe the best partnerships are

title: Graphic designer

Event Booth Design * Booth concept layout and visual design * Key messaging placement within the booth environment * Visual consistency across large-format prints and physical assets Marketing & Communication Assets * Email and newsletter visuals (headers, templates, event graphics) * Social media assets for LinkedIn and event promotion * Supporting visuals for digital campaigns around the event Branded Gifting * Concept and visual design for event merchandise/gifts * Packaging design aligned with brand identity and event theme * Visual system for premium/gamified gift tiers (e.g., “gold / silver / platinum” concepts) Ideal Profile * Ability to design across both digital and physical formats * Portfolio showing booth design, event branding, or campaign systems

desc: I need a professional resume writer to revamp my existing resume using my current LinkedIn profile as a reference. What I’m looking for: • Rewrite my bullet points to be ATS-optimized (keyword-rich, achievement-focused, quantified where possible) • Align the resume with my LinkedIn so both tell a consistent story • Weave in language that naturally positions me as a strong hybrid worker — things like cross-functional collaboration, independent ownership, async communication, etc. • Frame my J.B. Hunt Manager Trainee Program as a structured post-undergraduate training program — similar in weight to a fellowship or rotational program — not just a job title • Clean, modern formatting that passes ATS scanners What you’ll receive from me: • My current resume (Word or PDF) • My LinkedIn profile link • A brief on the types of roles I’m targeting Ideal freelancer: • Has experience writing resumes that get past ATS systems • Understands how to frame soft skills and work style without it feeling forced • Can deliver a polished final draft in Word format

title: Urgent Hindi Promo Reel
desc: I need a single, short graphics reel that answers the question “Why MB Cabs?” and positions the service as the smart choice for local rides. I’ll forward a reference video, our logo, colours and the key voice-over script the moment we start. Scope and expectations • Length: 20–30 seconds (square or vertical; match Instagram Reels specs) • Voice-over: native-sounding Hindi, energetic yet trustworthy • Visual feel: simple motion-graphics with a premium polish—clean typography, smooth transitions, subtle sound design • Assets I supply: logo PNG, brand palette, draft copy, sample reel for style direction • Final deliverable: mastered MP4 plus separate audio stem, delivered through Google Drive or WeTransfer no later than 4 AM IST tomorrow Budget sits around ₹600, so please keep proposals realistic for this quick turn-around. If you’re available right now, send one or two links to your best comparable work and confirm you can meet the deadline; I’ll reply immediately with the reference clip and brand assets so you can start.

title: High-End Wedding Photo Editor (Lightroom) — Long-Term Private Freelancer
desc: I am a high-volume Colorado wedding photographer (shooting 30+ weddings this year) transitioning into the luxury, editorial market. I am looking for a dedicated, individual private photo editor to become my long-term teammate and handle my post-production color grading. IMPORTANT: NO AGENCIES. I am looking for a single, dedicated freelancer so I can work with the exact same human on every single gallery to build total consistency. The Aesthetic: My brand is leaning heavily into a clean, cinematic, "Vogue/Editorial" documentary style. YES: True-to-life but elevated, clean skin tones, crisp whites, and a high-end magazine feel. NO: Heavy 2010s vignettes, muddy shadows, neon green color casts on skin, or overly "warm/boho/orange" filters. The Workflow: I will cull the gallery and send you a catalog with Lightroom Smart Previews. I will provide 15-20 "Anchor Edits" per wedding (covering getting ready, ceremony, portraits, and reception) to show you the exact lighting, white balance, and color grading I want. You will match the rest of the gallery (usually 600-800 photos) to those anchors. Requirements: You must have extensive experience in high-end wedding photography and know how to handle tricky lighting scenarios (harsh Colorado sun, green grass color casts, dark/mixed-light recep

title: Lightroom Editor Needed for Already-Culled Wedding Galleries
desc: Title: Wedding Photo Editor Needed for Already-Culled Galleries (around 46 over the next 12 months) Description: I’m a UK wedding photographer looking for a reliable freelance editor for ongoing work **please do not contact me through Instagram** This role is for already-culled wedding galleries, usually around 800 to 1,000 images. My preset will already be applied before the gallery is sent over, so I’m not asking someone to create a look from scratch. I also send preview images to clients within 24 hours of the wedding, and those preview edits will be included within the gallery as reference points so you can clearly see the exact style and finish I work towards. Wedding gallery edits normally take me 2 hours after culling. The job is to take that base edit and properly refine the full gallery so it feels clean, consistent, polished and finished from start to end. This is not a full culling role, and it is not heavy retouching. If you notice any obvious mistakes or images that clearly should not be included, you can flag them or remove them, but the gallery will already be culled before it reaches you. title: Title: Wedding Photo Editor Needed – Lightroom Preset-Based Editing – Ongoing Work
desc: Hi, I’m looking for a reliable wedding photo editor to help me with ongoing wedding galleries. The editing style is already defined. Project details: Each wedding gallery usually includes around 600–800 photos. The fixed price for each full wedding gallery is €75. The work includes: Applying my Lightroom preset Exposure correction White balance adjustment Basic color correction Contrast and tone adjustments Cropping and straightening when needed Keeping the full wedding gallery visually consistent Matching the overall look to the reference images provided Delivering the edited Lightroom catalog or updated Smart Previews The work does NOT include: Advanced skin retouching Photoshop editing Object removal Background replacement Heavy local adjustments Creative color grading from scratch Editing each image individually in a complex way Workflow: I usually work with Lightroom Classic.
